gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (61/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (61/ 4)
text: كَتَبَ إِلَيَّ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا غَضِبَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى عَلَى خَلْقِهِ نَحَّانَا عَنْ جِوَارِهِمْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ja’far Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Al Faraj who said,

‘Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> wrote to me: ‘Whenever Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High is Wrathful upon His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures, He<sup>azwj</sup> Forbids us<sup>asws</sup> from being in their vicinity’.
en.sarwar: 31. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ja’far ibn Muhammad from Ahmad ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn ‘Abdallah from Muhammad ibn al-Faraj who has said the following. “Abu Ja’far (a.s.) wrote to me, ‘when Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, is angry with His creatures He keeps us away from their neighborhood.”
